framework.name: W3C Verifiable Credentials as agent authorization standard
framework.description: AP2 uses W3C Verifiable Credentials specification as the technical foundation for all mandate types. Ensures tamper resistance, portability, and cross-ecosystem interoperability. First concrete deployment of W3C VC standard for financial agent authorization at scale.
framework.raw_quote: All mandates are expressed as W3C Verifiable Credentials, ensuring tamper resistance, portability, and interoperability across the ecosystem

source.title: Agent Payments Protocol: Building Verifiable Trust for Agentic ...
